data.body:
## Description
Modify `plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md` Step 5 (RED Test) to dispatch `dso:red-test-writer` instead of writing RED tests inline. Consume the shared escalation template at `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/red-task-escalation.md`. Preserve the mechanical bug exemption.

SAFEGUARD FILE: plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md is protected per CLAUDE.md rule 20.

## File Impact
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md

## TDD Requirement
Depends on task 133d-3cd9 (RED). After modification, RED tests must pass.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
- [ ] Fix-bug SKILL.md references dso:red-test-writer
  Verify: grep -q 'dso:red-test-writer' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] Fix-bug SKILL.md references escalation template
  Verify: grep -q 'red-task-escalation' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] Mechanical bug exemption preserved
  Verify: grep -qi 'mechanical.*exempt\|mechanical.*bypass' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] All RED tests pass (GREEN)
  Verify: python3 -m pytest $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test_fix_bug_skill_escalated_section.py -x
